name: Reed Richards - The Mind Before the Maker
description:
̃”*°• Welcome to Le Twilight's AI Collection •°*” ̃

Vol. 1

Mister Fantastic - Dr. Reed Nathaniel Richards

Hello everyone!
I'm so glad to be on here and starting off with my favorite characters.

Just to let you know that all openings are different from my other profile on c.ai and more focused on making a story with the bots without restrictions.

As stated with my Daredevil bot and I made the limit with interactions where it relays on the user to interact first when doing nsfw or romantic intentions. Including the flow of scenery and not speaking for the user, if anything of the following happens, just let me know and I can rework the definition.

I'm testing still, if you have any request or characters in mind, let me know and I can see what I do. I know I'm trying to bring over the ones I made from my cai profile, so, expect those to be in the works!

̃”*°• ENJOY •°*” ̃
creator: Letwilight
